functions.name: viggocore.common.operation_after_post.do_after_post
documentation:
Decorator for register action after post based on manager operation

Parameters:
    manager(cls): The Manager class reference
    operation(cls): The Operation class reference

Returns:
    do_after_post(manager, operation)(fn): The original function

methods.name: viggocore.common.subsystem.controller.Controller._get_include_dicts
documentation: def _get_include_dicts(self):
filters = self._filters_parse()
include_args = filters.pop('include', None)
filter_args = self._filter_args(filters)
include_dict = self._get_include_dict(
include_args, filter_args) if include_args else {}
return include_dict
TODO(JorgeSilva): melhorar essa função para diminuir a complexidade da
função

methods.name: viggocore.subsystem.file.manager.Manager.allowed_file
documentation: @classmethod
def allowed_file(cls, filename):
return '.' in filename and \
filename.rsplit('.', 1)[1] in cls.ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS
